creator: romain@FreeBSD.org
text:
Oh!

romain@zappy ~ % host rig.rain.com
Host rig.rain.com not found: 3(NXDOMAIN)

Maintainer (freebsd@rig.rain.com) will not receive mail…

rain.com does not resolve to any IP addresses and has redacted whois info:

zappy ~ % host rain.com
romain@zappy ~ % whois rain.com
[...]
Tech Name: REDACTED FOR PRIVACY
Tech Organization: REDACTED FOR PRIVACY
Tech Street: REDACTED FOR PRIVACY 
Tech City: REDACTED FOR PRIVACY
Tech State/Province: REDACTED FOR PRIVACY
Tech Postal Code: REDACTED FOR PRIVACY
Tech Country: REDACTED FOR PRIVACY
Tech Phone: REDACTED FOR PRIVACY
Tech Phone Ext: 
Tech Fax: REDACTED FOR PRIVACY
Tech Fax Ext: 
Tech Email: REDACTED FOR PRIVACY

I guess puppet@ can become maintainer of this since it's inline with the puppet stack?  Is it OK for you sunpoet?
